text:
Add lsp config and other essential things. Ruff lsp, ruff format, etc. -- Set leader key
vim.g.mapleader = " "
vim.g.maplocalleader = " "
vim.opt.scrolloff = 3

-- Basic settings
vim.o.hlsearch = false
vim.wo.number = true
vim.o.tabstop = 2
vim.o.expandtab = true
vim.o.softtabstop = 2
vim.o.shiftwidth = 2
vim.o.mouse = "a"
vim.o.clipboard = "unnamedplus"
vim.o.breakindent = true
vim.o.undofile = true
vim.o.ignorecase = true
vim.o.smartcase = true
vim.wo.signcolumn = "yes"
vim.o.updatetime = 250
vim.o.timeoutlen = 300
vim.o.completeopt = "menuone,noselect"
vim.o.termguicolors = true

-- Filetype detection for .templ files
vim.cmd("au BufRead,BufNewFile *.templ setfiletype templ")

-- Add Mason bin to path
local is_windows = vim.loop.os_uname().sysname == "Windows_NT"
vim.env.PATH = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/mason/bin" .. (is_windows and ";" or ":") .. vim.env.PATH

-- Install mini.nvim if not installed
local mini_path = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/site/pack/mini/start/mini.nvim"
if not vim.loop.fs_stat(mini_path) then
  vim.fn.system({
    "git",
    "clone",
    "https://github.com/echasnovski/mini.nvim",
    mini_path,
  })
end

-- Load mini.nvim
vim.cmd("packadd mini.nvim")

-- Setup mini modules
-- Load and configure mini.nvim modules
local MiniDeps = require("mini.deps")

MiniDeps.setup({ path = { package = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/site/pack/deps" } })

MiniDeps.add({
  source = "echasnovski/mini.nvim",
  depends = {},
  hooks = {
    post_checkout = function()
      vim.cmd("packadd mini.nvim")
    end,
  },
})

-- Load modules after mini.nvim is ensured
require("mini.basics").setup({
  options = {
    basic = true,
    extra_ui = true,
    win_borders = "single",
  },
  mappings = {
    basic = true,
    option_toggle_prefix = [[\]],
    windows = true,
    move_with_alt = true,
  },
})

require("mini.pairs").setup()
require("mini.comment").setup()
require("mini.ai").setup()
require("mini.indentscope").setup({
  symbol = "│",
  options = { try_as_border = true },
})

require("mini.files").setup()

-- Optional: statusline
require("mini.statusline").setup()

-- Optional: Starter (dashboard)
require("mini.starter").setup()

-- Optional: Surround
require("mini.surround").setup()

-- Optional: Bracketed motions (like [b ]b)
require("mini.bracketed").setup()

-- Telescope and dependencies
MiniDeps.add({ source = "nvim-lua/plenary.nvim" }) -- Required by Telescope
MiniDeps.add({
  source = "nvim-telescope/telescope.nvim",
  depends = { "nvim-lua/plenary.nvim" },
})

-- 🧠 Lazy-load Telescope on keymap
vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>ff", function()
  require("telescope.builtin").find_files()
end, { desc = "Find Files" })

vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>fg", function()
  require("telescope.builtin").live_grep()
end, { desc = "Live Grep" })

vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>fb", function()
  require("telescope.builtin").buffers()
end, { desc = "List Buffers" })

vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>fh", function()
  require("telescope.builtin").help_tags()
end, { desc = "Help Tags" })

-- Optional: configure Telescope only when it loads
vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd("User", {
  pattern = "VeryLazy", -- or use first telescope keybinding event
  callback = function()
    require("telescope").setup({
      defaults = {
        layout_config = { prompt_position = "top" },
        sorting_strategy = "ascending",
        winblend = 10,
      },
    })
  end,
})


Here's your configuration updated with LSP, Ruff, and other essential features:

-- Set leader key
vim.g.mapleader = " "
vim.g.maplocalleader = " "
vim.opt.scrolloff = 3

-- Basic settings
vim.o.hlsearch = false
vim.wo.number = true
vim.o.tabstop = 2
vim.o.expandtab = true
vim.o.softtabstop = 2
vim.o.shiftwidth = 2
vim.o.mouse = "a"
vim.o.clipboard = "unnamedplus"
vim.o.breakindent = true
vim.o.undofile = true
vim.o.ignorecase = true
vim.o.smartcase = true
vim.wo.signcolumn = "yes"
vim.o.updatetime = 250
vim.o.timeoutlen = 300
vim.o.completeopt = "menuone,noselect"
vim.o.termguicolors = true

-- Filetype detection for .templ files
vim.cmd("au BufRead,BufNewFile *.templ setfiletype templ")

-- Add Mason bin to path
local is_windows = vim.loop.os_uname().sysname == "Windows_NT"
vim.env.PATH = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/mason/bin" .. (is_windows and ";" or ":") .. vim.env.PATH

-- Install mini.nvim if not installed
local mini_path = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/site/pack/mini/start/mini.nvim"
if not vim.loop.fs_stat(mini_path) then
  vim.fn.system({
    "git",
    "clone",
    "https://github.com/echasnovski/mini.nvim",
    mini_path,
  })
end

-- Load mini.nvim
vim.cmd("packadd mini.nvim")

-- Setup mini modules
-- Load and configure mini.nvim modules
local MiniDeps = require("mini.deps")

MiniDeps.setup({ path = { package = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/site/pack/deps" } })

MiniDeps.add({
  source = "echasnovski/mini.nvim",
  depends = {},
  hooks = {
    post_checkout = function()
      vim.cmd("packadd mini.nvim")
    end,
  },
})

-- Load modules after mini.nvim is ensured
require("mini.basics").setup({
  options = {
    basic = true,
    extra_ui = true,
    win_borders = "single",
  },
  mappings = {
    basic = true,
    option_toggle_prefix = [[\]],
    windows = true,
    move_with_alt = true,
  },
})

require("mini.pairs").setup()
require("mini.comment").setup()
require("mini.ai").setup()
require("mini.indentscope").setup({
  symbol = "│",
  options = { try_as_border = true },
})

require("mini.files").setup()

-- Optional: statusline
require("mini.statusline").setup()

-- Optional: Starter (dashboard)
require("mini.starter").setup()

-- Optional: Surround
require("mini.surround").setup()

-- Optional: Bracketed motions (like [b ]b)
require("mini.bracketed").setup()

-- LSP, Ruff and essential development tools
MiniDeps.add({ source = "neovim/nvim-lspconfig" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "williamboman/mason.nvim" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "williamboman/mason-lspconfig.nvim" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/nvim-cmp" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/cmp-nvim-lsp" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/cmp-buffer" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/cmp-path" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "L3MON4D3/LuaSnip" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "saadparwaiz1/cmp_luasnip" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "folke/neodev.nvim" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "rafamadriz/friendly-snippets" })

-- Telescope and dependencies
MiniDeps.add({ source = "nvim-lua/plenary.nvim" }) -- Required by Telescope
MiniDeps.add({
  source = "nvim-telescope/telescope.nvim",
  depends = { "nvim-lua/plenary.nvim" },
})

-- Configuration for LSP and other tools
vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd("User", {
  pattern = "MiniDepsLoadPost",
  callback = function()
    -- Setup neodev for Lua development
    require("neodev").setup()
    
    -- Setup LSP with Mason
    require("mason").setup({
      ui = {
        icons = {
          package_installed = "✓",
          package_pending = "➜",
          package_uninstalled = "✗"
        }
      }
    })
    
    -- Load snippets
    require("luasnip.loaders.from_vscode").lazy_load()
    
    local lspconfig = require("lspconfig")
    local mason_lspconfig = require("mason-lspconfig")
    local capabilities = require("cmp_nvim_lsp").default_capabilities()
    
    -- LSP servers to install
    mason_lspconfig.setup({
      ensure_installed = {
        "lua_ls",       -- Lua
        "pyright",      -- Python
        "ruff_lsp",     -- Python linter/formatter
        "gopls",        -- Go
        "tsserver",     -- TypeScript
        "html",         -- HTML
        "cssls",        -- CSS
        "jsonls",       -- JSON
        "templ",        -- Go Templ
      },
      automatic_installation = true,
    })
    
    -- Configure LSP servers
    mason_lspconfig.setup_handlers({
      function(server_name)
        lspconfig[server_name].setup({
          capabilities = capabilities,
        })
      end,
      
      -- Custom Lua LSP settings
      ["lua_ls"] = function()
        lspconfig.lua_ls.setup({
          capabilities = capabilities,
          settings = {
            Lua = {
              diagnostics = {
                globals = { "vim" },
              },
              workspace = {
                library = vim.api.nvim_get_runtime_file("", true),
                checkThirdParty = false,
              },
              telemetry = { enable = false },
            },
          },
        })
      end,
      
      -- Ruff LSP specific settings
      ["ruff_lsp"] = function()
        lspconfig.ruff_lsp.setup({
          capabilities = capabilities,
          init_options = {
            settings = {
              -- Configure Ruff settings
              fixAll = true,
              organizeImports = true,
              -- Default formatter settings for Ruff
              format = {
                args = {},
              },
              lint = {
                args = {},
              },
            }
          }
        })
      end,
    })
    
    -- Configure nvim-cmp
    local cmp = require("cmp")
    local luasnip = require("luasnip")
    
    cmp.setup({
      snippet = {
        expand = function(args)
          luasnip.lsp_expand(args.body)
        end,
      },
      mapping = cmp.mapping.preset.insert({
        ["<C-Space>"] = cmp.mapping.complete(),
        ["<CR>"] = cmp.mapping.confirm({ select = true }),
        ["<Tab>"] = cmp.mapping(function(fallback)
          if cmp.visible() then
            cmp.select_next_item()
          elseif luasnip.expand_or_jumpable() then
            luasnip.expand_or_jump()
          else
            fallback()
          end
        end, { "i", "s" }),
        ["<S-Tab>"] = cmp.mapping(function(fallback)
          if cmp.visible() then
            cmp.select_prev_item()
          elseif luasnip.jumpable(-1) then
            luasnip.jump(-1)
          else
            fallback()
          end
        end, { "i", "s" }),
      }),
      sources = cmp.config.sources({
        { name = "nvim_lsp" },
        { name = "luasnip" },
        { name = "buffer" },
        { name = "path" },
      }),
    })
    
    -- LSP keymaps
    vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd("LspAttach", {
      callback = function(event)
        local opts = { buffer = event.buf, noremap = true, silent = true }
        
        vim.keymap.set("n", "gd", vim.lsp.buf.definition, opts)
        vim.keymap.set("n", "K", vim.lsp.buf.hover, opts)
        vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>rn", vim.lsp.buf.rename, opts)
        vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>ca", vim.lsp.buf.code_action, opts)
        vim.keymap.set("n", "gr", vim.lsp.buf.references, opts)
